code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut result = ""
    mut first = true
    mut in_num = false
    mut sign = 1
    mut value = 0
    while i <= n
      mut b = 0
      mut is_end = false
      if i == n
        is_end = true
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(x)
          b = x
        when None
          is_end = true
        end
      end

      let is_digit = (not is_end) and b >= 48 and b <= 57
      let is_minus = (not is_end) and b == 45

      if is_digit
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          sign = 1
          value = 0
        end
        value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
      else if is_minus and not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 0 - 1
        value = 0
      else
        if in_num
          let doubled = sign * value * 2
          if first
            result = "#{doubled}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
          end
          in_num = false
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
